author: claude

patch.value: Pack the package, install it into /tmp/pm-changelog-verify-2026-05-25, run pm install ./package.tgz --project, exercise pm changelog generate --stdout, and confirm exit codes plus markdown shape.
Verify pm-changelog install and CLI work in a clean temp folder
Smoke-test that pm-changelog can be installed into a fresh temporary project via local path and that the pm extension command activates and produces a CHANGELOG.md.
Temp install activates the pm changelog command, generate --stdout returns non-empty markdown with release headings, and no errors are emitted on stderr.
Catches packaging regressions before publishing to npm.
Protects downstream consumers from broken installs of pm-changelog.
Verification run logged; CHANGELOG.md from temp project matches expected shape.

value.author: claude
value.text: Use a unique temp directory per run to avoid stale state.

value.author: claude
value.text: pm install with a local path bypasses the npm SDK dependency bug (pm-cli #53).
